LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ERIC GREEN'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED AND THE CLASS CLAIMS WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Dec-23-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Samuel Goldsmith (samuel@bryanschwartzlaw.com) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Discussed re: filing of declaration of individuals entering into agreement and CRC 3.770 (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIC GREEN's Motion To Dismiss is granted and the class claims will be dismissed without prejudice.

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
